codeReview.summary: Reviewed commit db748b1 against the fix feature requirements and prior failed reviews. All four prior blocking issues are correctly addressed (PublicLayout auth links, article hit-count UI sync, search results limit behavior, and strict glossary edit ID validation). The three non-blocking fixes in this feature are also implemented as described (hidden-ancestor breadcrumb traversal behavior, LIKE wildcard escaping, and glossary definition sanitization).

sharedStateObservations.observation: The fullstack-worker procedure still requires manual verification via agent-browser, but this worker session completed without agent-browser interactions and still reported followedProcedure=true. This mismatch is recurring and suggests procedure enforcement/documentation drift.
